description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a light blue finish and a subtle rainbow graphic on the underside, flanked by two white clouds. The deck is constructed from layered wood, likely maple, and is equipped with silver metal trucks and white classic street wheels. The top of the deck is covered in solid black grip tape, providing traction for the rider. The trucks are mounted in a standard configuration, and the wheels are medium-sized, suitable for street or park skating. The overall design is clean and minimalistic, with the only artwork being the rainbow motif. No visible brand logos or additional graphics are present on the deck or wheels.
description: A light blue skateboard with a rainbow graphic, white wheels, silver trucks, and solid black grip tape. The design is minimalistic and clean, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skateboard's profile, white wheels, silver trucks, and the light blue deck with a hint of the rainbow graphic.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the solid black grip tape covering the entire deck, with no visible graphics or text.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the skateboard's profile, wheels, and trucks, with the rainbow graphic partially visible.
description_view_3: Bottom view clearly showing the light blue deck with a centered rainbow and cloud graphic, as well as the white wheels and silver trucks.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: A centered rainbow with two white clouds on a light blue background, minimalistic and playful, with no text or additional motifs.
attribute_wheel_type: classic street wheels, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard silver metal trucks, top-mounted, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern, graphics, or text
